title: scrophularia variegata subsp. rupestris
intro: Scrophularia variegata subsp. rupestris, also known as the Rock Figwort, is a plant species belonging to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). It is used in traditional medicine for its antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Rock Figwort include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Rock Figwort can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is also used in herbal tinctures and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
